---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken — help us fix it
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Include error messages and stack traces if applicable.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Node.js version | e.g. 20.11.0 |
| pnpm version | e.g. 9.1.0 |
| Browser (if UI bug) | e.g. Chrome 122, Firefox 123 |
| Running via | Docker Compose / Manual setup |

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (specific fruit/city combination, time of day, etc.).
